meta.title: Home
meta.description: Your guide to all things queer.

hero.title: Your Guide to All Things Queer
hero.description: We are Queer Kit. A community-driven guide building the most comprehensive resource for LGBTQ+ knowledge and connection.

certification.title: Get Certified
certification.description: Get your official Queer Certification card.

wiki.title: The Wiki
wiki.description: Our community encyclopedia covering various topics.

merch.title: Shop Merch
merch.description: Show your pride with our collection of queer apparel.

vision.title: Building a world of inclusive knowledge
vision.description: Queer Kit is a community-focused, independent initiative. We don't just aggregate data; we curate a safe, accurate, and living knowledge base that respects the diversity of queer experience.

news.title: Community Broadcasts
news.description: Stay updated with the latest news and additions to Queer Kit.

history.title: Now Live: History Deep Dive
history.description: Our new section on early 20th-century queer activism is now available.

mod.title: Community Moderator Program
mod.description: We're looking for passionate people to help keep our spaces safe.

term.title: Terminology Update
term.description: Refreshing our glossary with more modern and inclusive definitions.

join.title: Join the Community
join.privacy: We respect your privacy. Important community updates only.

hero.title: Our Story
hero.description: We are a collective of researchers, creators, and advocates building the next generation of queer knowledge.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide accurate, inclusive, and empowering resources for the LGBTQ+ community.
mission.p2: Founded by a collective of advocates and community builders, Queer Kit is dedicated to preserving history and empowering the future of the LGBTQ+ community. We believe in the power of shared knowledge to bring people together.

community.title: Community First
community.description: Everything we do starts and ends with the community experience. We listen, learn, and build for our collective.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We explore new ways to organize and present information to create accessible and memorable resources.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: Great resources are built by great teams. We foster an environment of trust, respect, and open communication.

hero.title: Volunteer at Queer Kit
hero.description: Join us in creating the future of queer knowledge.

culture.title: Life at Queer Kit
culture.description: We foster a culture of inclusion, collaboration, and continuous learning.
culture.p2: We believe that the best work happens when people feel safe, supported, and inspired. At Queer Kit, we empower our team to take ownership, experiment, and grow.

health.title: Well-being Resources
health.description: Access to community-vetted mental and physical health guides.

time.title: Flexible Contribution
time.description: Contribute as much or as little as you want, on your own schedule.

development.title: Skill Development
development.description: Learn about research, moderation, and community management.

gear.title: Community Tools
gear.description: Access to our internal tools and platforms to help you build.

remote.title: Remote-First
remote.description: We're a distributed team with flexible working hours. Work from wherever you feel inspired.

spaces.title: Queer Spaces
spaces.description: Our community thrives in safe spaces online and offline. Join our Discord or local meetups to connect with the team.

positions.title: Open Positions
positions.empty: No open positions at the moment. Check back later!
